'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=HpvUhlS.r83rLXC8kXWNBY5VTikMkyTinpCfMzjtVtg-1773867453-1.0.1.1-WDMZD6gID1qapVLmYMl8QBcGJTRD42wcPcJhbl.75N8"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
